uplink._note: Single accelerometer alarm channel asserting motion; expected derived from the upstream accel_alarm_status field (port 10, header 0x00 0x00, uint8>0) per reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Full data uplink: battery+EOS, motion alarm, temperature, humidity, acceleration vector
uplink._note: Composite of all fPort-10 channels. battery 0x85: bit7 EOS alert, low7=5 -> 5*0.01+2.5=2.55 V. motion 0x01 -> detected. temp 0x00D7=215 ->21.5C. hum 90*0.5=45%. accel x=0x03E8(1000)->1.000g, y=0xFC18(-1000)->-1.000g, z=0 ->0.000g. Expected hand-computed from reference/upstream-codec.js field definitions.

uplink.description: No-motion state with negative on-board temperature (two's complement)
uplink._note: accel_alarm_status 0x00 -> motion not detected; temperature 0xFFEC = -20 counts * 0.1 = -2.0 C (signed16 two's complement).

uplink.description: BLE scan uplink on fPort 100 is not a motion uplink (rejected)
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input (BLE mode/device-count). Carries BLE-scan data, not motion; this motion codec only decodes the fPort-10 accelerometer data uplink.

uplink.description: Unrecognized channel/type header on the data port
uplink._note: 0x99 0x99 is not a defined fPort-10 channel/type pair.
